message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 基于GitHub的实验管理平台--选择课程用例的顺序图

actor "教师" as Teacher
participant "系统" as System
participant "课程信息" as CourseInfo
participant "选课信息" as EnrollmentInfo
participant "实验信息" as ExperimentInfo
participant "评分细则信息" as GradingCriteriaInfo
participant "实验评分信息" as ExperimentScoreInfo

Teacher -> System: 发起评分请求
activate System
System -> CourseInfo: 查询本学期当前教师所教授的课程
activate CourseInfo
CourseInfo -->> System: 返回课程信息
deactivate CourseInfo
System -->> Teacher: 返回课程信息
deactivate System

Teacher -> System: 选择需要评分的课程
activate System
System -> EnrollmentInfo: 查询选择本课程的学生信息
activate EnrollmentInfo
EnrollmentInfo -->> System: 返回学生信息
deactivate EnrollmentInfo
System -->> Teacher: 返回学生信息
deactivate System

loop 
    Teacher -> System: 选择需要评分的学生
    activate System
    System -> ExperimentInfo: 查询当前课程的实验信息
    activate ExperimentInfo
    ExperimentInfo -->> System: 返回当前课程的实验信息
    deactivate ExperimentInfo
    
    System -> GradingCriteriaInfo: 查询每个实验的评分细则信息
    activate GradingCriteriaInfo
    GradingCriteriaInfo -->> System: 返回评分细则信息
    deactivate GradingCriteriaInfo
    
    System -> ExperimentScoreInfo: 查询本学生当前课程已被评分的细则信息
    activate ExperimentScoreInfo
    ExperimentScoreInfo -->> System: 返回信息
    deactivate ExperimentScoreInfo
    
    System -->> Teacher: 返回本学生当前课程的实验信息
    Teacher -> System: 进行评分
    System -> ExperimentScoreInfo: 存储评分
    activate ExperimentScoreInfo
    ExperimentScoreInfo -->> System: 存储成功
    deactivate ExperimentScoreInfo
    
    System -> EnrollmentInfo: 统计课程总分数
    activate EnrollmentInfo
    EnrollmentInfo -->> System: 统计成功
    deactivate EnrollmentInfo
    
    System -->> Teacher: 评分成功
    deactivate System
end

@enduml
```
